suggestions.text:
Hi Alex,

Thanks for following up. I am reviewing the remaining items and will confirm whether Thursday is feasible by end of day.

Best regards

Hi Alex,

Appreciate the check-in. I need a little more time to validate the scope before committing to Thursday. I will reply with a confirmed date shortly.

Thanks

warnings.message: This reply mentions confirming a date but the context does not support a firm commitment.

suggestions.text:
